fields.name: Reminder Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies translation of reminder terms so that customers are reminded in their own language.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Note About Line Fee on Report
fields.tooltip: Specifies that any notes about line fees will be added to the reminder.
